attacking_style: Rarely attacks for himself when in domestique role; when given freedom, attacks solo 3km from mountain summit finishes, preferring sustained climbing efforts over explosive short gradients.
team_tactics: Deployed as primary high-mountain pacer for Jumbo-Visma GC leaders, setting extended tempo to eliminate rivals rather than launching attacks. Team typically burns him early but protects him when unexpectedly in GC contention, though with visible indecision.
terrain_preference: Exceptional on sustained high-altitude climbs above 2000m with steady gradients. Vulnerable on short, explosive steep pitches and second-half gradient increases where pure punchy climbers excel.
vulnerability: Loses significant time on ultra-steep finales and explosive gradients (lost 1:05 to Vingegaard on short steep climb, 29s on steep second-half gradients). Struggles under GC pressure, requiring team intervention when dropped.
key_patterns: Functions as elite mountain domestique, pacing final climbs for Roglic/Vingegaard across 8+ observations
High-altitude specialist thrives above 2000m; won stage at altitude when given freedom (2 wins)
Vulnerable on steep explosive climbs versus sustained efforts; repeatedly lost time on steep finales
Effective energy management: sits on wheels then sprints for bonuses when not pacing
Team shows reluctance/indecision protecting him as GC leader despite strong climbing form
Peaks specifically for breakaway stage wins in Grand Tours (3 GT stage 15 wins)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 Vuelta showed exceptional climbing form early (won stage, took red jersey) but exposed vulnerability under GC pressure on explosive climbs, requiring team protection to maintain narrow margins. Returned to domestique role at 2023 Giro.
